complete_cause_list: C1 KEYSTONE-A (consolidation): finding_key[0]=='__unknown__' for ALL 64 clusters (manifest finding_dedup.clusters[0-4] all ['__unknown__', <ev_id>, 0]), so the dedup key collapses to each source's own ev_id; every cluster is a structural singleton (corroboration_count=1), collapsed=0 GUARANTEED (log:836). No source dropped, but the multi-citation basket is never built — ~785 verified corroborators never attach to the 9 surfaced claims.

C2 KEYSTONE-B (basket decoupled from LLM judge): _credibility_guard_decision returns 'degrade' when judge is None (multi_section_generator.py:147-148), which SKIPS the whole credibility-pass body, so credibility_analysis=None; weighted_enrichment.py:180-181 then returns [] reason=_REASON_CREDIBILITY_NONE. In run5 PG_CREDIBILITY_LLM_JUDGE=off (log:838) so this fired — enrichment EMPTY (log:846). run_credibility_analysis ALREADY supports judge=None priors-only (credibility_pass.py:691,700) so the basket CAN be built deterministically; it is wrongly gated behind the LLM judge.

C3 RESIDUAL consolidation: even priors-only, claim_graph build_merge_key fail-closes to singletons for clinical numerics with blank dose/comparator/endpoint, re-fragmenting sources; PG_BASKET_CONSUME_FINDING_DEDUP must be ON so _regroup_graph_by_finding_dedup merges the partition by finding_dedup membership before _assemble_baskets (group+edge-remap only, no member newly passes any gate, credibility_pass.py:401).

C4 RENDER gate on WIDE: weighted_enrichment surfaces wide only if PG_BREADTH_ENRICHMENT_RENDER_VERIFIED_SPANS (FIX-K) is ON (renders the verified spans verbatim); else it LLM-regenerates prose and ~0 survives strict_verify. The restored basket renders narrow without this flag.

C5 FAITHFUL P0 (4-role D8 seam crash): role-transport client force-closed on a total-deadline timeout (openrouter_role_transport.py:479) and its rebuild swallowed by 'except Exception: pass' (1157); next Mirror/Judge transport.complete() hits a closed client, httpx raises a plain RuntimeError (_client.py:901) matching NONE of the retry except arms (1149/1170/1186), it escapes and tears down the whole seam -> D8 UNADJUDICATED coverage=0.000, report ships released_insufficient_safety_evidence (log:1225-1226). The strongest faithfulness gate never adjudicated.

C6 amplifier (seam): Mirror/Judge roles have no per-claim transport-fault degrade (Sentinel does, sentinel_adapter.py:426-465), so one faulted claim zeroes all ~123 (role_pipeline.py:320-330, sweep_integration.py:585).

C7 FAITHFULNESS traceability (ev_1 Efficacy): 5 PICO sentences render VERIFIED citing a 489-char NEJM security-page shell (log:805); NLI caught it but is advisory (manifest:6924) and M-69 rescued the strict_verify drops — claim matches the real trial but the cited SPAN is a security page (§-1.1 mis-citation on a load-bearing clinical framing).

C8 FAITHFULNESS tightening (M-69 rescue): contract_section_runner rescues no_content_word_overlap drops on the static 'M-58 verified verbatim' assumption without re-checking the resolved span is non-shell (log:869) — a quiet bypass of the only binding gate for contract sentences whose span degraded to a shell.

C9 CONTRACT slot (M-70 regulatory heading mismatch): entity required_fields (warning/mechanism/clinical_consequence/management) never match the fixed _FDA_HEADINGS vocabulary (regulatory_synthesizer.py:102), so a fully-fetched 43081-char FDA carbidopa-levodopa label (log:833) yields zero segments -> dopaminergic_withdrawal_caution renders as gap (log:850-851).

C10 CONTRACT slot (device-safety fetch shell): dbs_device_mri_safety anchored to FDA P960009.pdf which every backend returned as a shell (174/266 chars, log:830-831), no OA-mirror/PMC fallback, A15 recovered spans don't propagate into the V30 slot (log:789) -> regulatory_dbs_device_safety renders as gap.

C11 CONTRACT slot (M-58 staging + over-strict year reject): mds.22340 fetched 7408 chars but core_client REJECTED the canonical copy on a year-metadata mismatch (expected 2008 got 2012, log:807/1242) -> mechanism_disease_staging renders as gap (log:864) — the entity most on-topic for the caregiver question.

C12 quantified_analysis silent no-op: 4025 sourced numbers extracted, 0 modeled, fired=False (manifest:7155-7163); declined_no_spec conflates a genuine writer decline with a swallowed transport miss (quantified_analysis.py:59-60), and given the run's pervasive transport faults the spec call most likely failed in transport but was mislabeled a decline.

C13 render bibliography blank URL: cited [2] dbs_complications_warning_signs (anchors ~12 Mechanism+Safety sentences) renders url='' (bibliography.json:14) despite a DOI in available_artifacts — §-1.1 traceability hole on a load-bearing citation.
C14 distill MAP drop: ev_116 + ev_687 lost their coverage map on a transient empty-error MAP fault with no retry (log:956-957) — 2 sources silently excluded from findings.

C15 telemetry false-negative (observability): storm_query_expansion + agentic_search report firing_status='enabled_not_reached' (manifest:7246) though STORM personas DID fire (log:20) — a resume-from-snapshot bypasses the in-band telemetry-update block, mis-judging discovery as a silent degrade and risking FL-05 false alarms.

Q1 latent (credibility LLM-judge deadlock, NOT the run5 trigger): nested thread pools (credibility_skill.py:309 outer future.result with NO timeout + credibility_judge_caller.py:119 inner fut.result on a trickle socket whose read-gap never trips) deadlock when the LLM judge is ON. PG_CREDIBILITY_LLM_JUDGE=off mitigates it but that is what triggers C2. Real in code; must NOT be re-armed by the keystone.

NO MISSED SOURCE-DROP HOP within 794->9: collapsed=0, evidence_selection.dropped_count=0, sentences_dropped=49 are FAITHFULNESS-correct strict_verify/NLI drops (NOT a defect). The only real pre-fetch DROP is upstream of the 794 denominator: 324 candidates dropped to fit fetch_cap=740 (report.md:41-42) — out of scope, do NOT remove it and do NOT let any fix add a cap.
keystone_fix: DECOUPLE basket assembly from the LLM credibility judge — Form B (deadlock-free, preferred). On the judge=None path, pass a DETERMINISTIC verify_fn (strict_verify span/numeric/content-overlap with PG_STRICT_VERIFY_ENTAILMENT=off, no LLM) into _assemble_baskets (credibility_pass.py:527,842 already accept a settable verify_fn) so the priors-only unbound-SUPPORTS basket is built fully LLM-free, AND flip _credibility_guard_decision (multi_section_generator.py:147-148) from 'degrade'->'run' when judge is None + always_release ON so the body actually runs. run_credibility_analysis already supports judge=None priors-only (credibility_pass.py:691,700) and basket weight_mass is authority-only/uninflatable, so the priors-only baskets carry real deterministic weights. weighted_enrichment then reads a POPULATED basket instead of returning [] (the run5 chokepoint). This restores breadth with ZERO hang surface because no LLM is in the basket path. Form A (keep the LLM entailment site #2 _verify_member_in_isolation->verify_sentence_provenance hot, just flip the guard) is the SAME decouple but RE-ARMS the Q72/Q76/Q90 hang — Form A is acceptable ONLY if ITEM 2a (thread-local judge) + PG_CREDIBILITY_PASS_MAX_INFLIGHT>1 + PG_CREDIBILITY_PASS_WALL_S ship as HARD co-requisites (then ITEM 2a is P0, not P2). Faithfulness is untouched: every basket member still independently passes strict_verify against the already-verified claim; the basket per-member verdict is an advisory LABEL, and the binding gates (section strict_verify / NLI / 4-role D8 / span-grounding) are unchanged. No cap/floor/throttle added.
breadth_restore_path: FOUR stacked conditions, ALL required — breadth stays narrow if any one fails: (1) POPULATE finding_key[0] in the distiller's finding-row emission with the normalized claim/predicate/subject key (currently '__unknown__' for all 64 clusters, manifest), so same-claim rows from different hosts share a key and consolidate into one multi-citation basket (keep ALL members). (2) DECOUPLE the basket from the LLM judge (the KEYSTONE, Form B): build the priors-only basket deterministically when judge=None so weighted_enrichment reads a populated basket instead of returning [] reason=credibility_analysis_none. (3) Set PG_BASKET_CONSUME_FINDING_DEDUP=ON so _regroup_graph_by_finding_dedup (credibility_pass.py:385-518) merges the claim_graph singleton partition by finding_dedup membership before _assemble_baskets (group+edge-remap only, faithfulness-neutral by construction). (4) Set PG_BREADTH_ENRICHMENT_RENDER_VERIFIED_SPANS=ON (FIX-K) so the surfaced basket renders its already-verified spans VERBATIM rather than LLM-regenerating prose (~0 of which survives strict_verify). With all four, the SAME 121 verified sentences carry their full verified-corroborator baskets and the bibliography goes 9 -> ~200+ (every additional corroborator still independently passes strict_verify/entailment — entailed_count=112 proves the entailment judge is live this run). The pre-fetch fetch_cap=740 (324 dropped) is upstream of the 794 denominator and out of scope.

prioritized_fixes.problem: finding_key[0]=='__unknown__' for all 64 clusters; dedup key degenerates to each source's own ev_id, every cluster is a structural singleton (corroboration_count=1), collapsed=0 guaranteed; the multi-citation basket is never built so ~785 verified corroborators never attach to the 9 surfaced claims.
prioritized_fixes.locus: outputs/iarch011_drb78_run5/full_run.log:836 (raw=794 distinct=64 collapsed=0) + manifest finding_dedup.clusters[*].finding_key[0]='__unknown__'; emission in the evidence distiller MAP step (src/polaris_graph/generator/evidence_distiller.py finding-row emission)
prioritized_fixes.fix: Populate finding_key[0] with the actual normalized claim/predicate/subject key in the distiller finding-row emission, so same-claim rows from different hosts share a key and consolidate into one multi-citation basket. Keep ALL members (consolidate-keep-all). Each member still flows through UNCHANGED strict_verify before attachment.

prioritized_fixes.problem: _credibility_guard_decision returns 'degrade' (skip whole pass body) when judge is None, so credibility_analysis=None and weighted_enrichment returns [] (reason _REASON_CREDIBILITY_NONE). In run5 PG_CREDIBILITY_LLM_JUDGE=off fired this -> enrichment EMPTY. The basket is wrongly gated behind the LLM judge even though run_credibility_analysis already supports judge=None priors-only.
prioritized_fixes.fix: Form B (deadlock-free, preferred): on the judge=None path pass a DETERMINISTIC verify_fn (strict_verify, PG_STRICT_VERIFY_ENTAILMENT=off, no LLM) into _assemble_baskets AND flip the guard 'degrade'->'run' when judge is None + always_release ON, so the priors-only basket is built fully LLM-free with zero hang surface. Form A (keep LLM site #2 hot) acceptable ONLY with ITEM 2a thread-local judge + bounded inflight + wall as HARD co-requisites. Credibility applies as a per-citation weight/LABEL, never a precondition for the basket existing.

prioritized_fixes.problem: 4-role D8 (strongest faithfulness gate) crashed: a force-closed role-transport client + a swallowed rebuild leads the next Mirror/Judge POST to a closed client, httpx raises a plain RuntimeError that matches none of the retry except arms, it escapes and tears down the whole seam -> D8 UNADJUDICATED coverage=0.000, report ships released_insufficient_safety_evidence. FAITHFUL fails, not breadth.
prioritized_fixes.locus: src/polaris_graph/roles/openrouter_role_transport.py:970-979 (_http_client getter), :479 (force-close), :1156-1157 (swallowed rebuild 'except Exception: pass'); httpx _client.py:901; full_run.log:1225-1226
prioritized_fixes.fix: In the _http_client getter, rebuild a closed client however it was closed: 'if client is None or client.is_closed:' (httpx.Client.is_closed confirmed to exist + flip True on .close()). Stop swallowing the factory rebuild failure at :1157 — log it loudly (LAW II). Byte-identical on the healthy path; on the closed path it restores adjudication or surfaces the EXISTING fail-closed RoleTransportError (D8 HOLDS, never a fake verdict).

prioritized_fixes.problem: Even priors-only, claim_graph build_merge_key fail-closes to singletons for clinical numerics with blank dose/comparator/endpoint, re-fragmenting sources; verified_support_origin_count stays <=1 and the 'multi-source corroborated' header reads ~0.
prioritized_fixes.fix: Force PG_BASKET_CONSUME_FINDING_DEDUP=ON in the run slate so _regroup_graph_by_finding_dedup MERGES the claim partition by finding_dedup membership before _assemble_baskets (group + edge-remap ONLY; claims/spans the isolated verify reads are untouched, no member newly passes any gate). Verify it is force-ON; if absent, add it. Faithfulness-neutral by construction.

prioritized_fixes.problem: Even with the basket restored, enrichment renders wide ONLY if it renders the already-verified spans verbatim; otherwise it LLM-regenerates prose and ~0 survives strict_verify, so breadth stays narrow.
prioritized_fixes.fix: Set PG_BREADTH_ENRICHMENT_RENDER_VERIFIED_SPANS=ON (FIX-K) so the surfaced basket renders its already-verified spans verbatim instead of LLM-regenerating. This is the render-side half of the breadth-restore; without it the basket is built but not surfaced. No cap/floor — it renders already-verified content.

prioritized_fixes.problem: M-69 rescues no_content_word_overlap strict_verify drops on the static 'M-58 verified verbatim' assumption without re-checking the resolved cited span is non-shell — a quiet bypass admitting sentences (e.g. the ev_1 Efficacy PICO) whose claim does not overlap a shell span.
prioritized_fixes.fix: Before rescuing a no_content_word_overlap drop, re-confirm the cited span is (a) not a detected shell (len >= the frame_fetcher content_starved floor) AND (b) still shares >=2 content words OR passes the same-source local-window entailment check (provenance_generator.py:2170). If neither holds, do NOT rescue — let it drop and be disclosed. This is a faithfulness TIGHTENING (removes a bypass), adds no throttle.

prioritized_fixes.problem: ev_1 Efficacy: 5 PICO sentences render VERIFIED citing a 489-char NEJM security-page shell; NLI caught the disconnect but is advisory so the dispute never reconciles into the rendered text — a §-1.1 mis-citation on a load-bearing clinical framing.
prioritized_fixes.locus: report.md:13 + manifest nli_verification.disputed (~6928-6959, advisory=true @6924) + the log:1227 redact/reconciliation step
prioritized_fixes.fix: In the render reconciliation path, when nli_verification.disputed contains a sentence, attach a per-claim 'span-imprecise / NLI-disputed' LABEL to that exact sentence (a label, never a drop — faithful to always-release). Do NOT make NLI a hard drop. Strengthens traceability, adds no cap. Pairs with F6 (fail-closing the rescue on a shell span).

prioritized_fixes.problem: Mirror/Judge roles have no per-claim transport-fault degrade (Sentinel does), so one faulted claim zeroes all ~123 adjudicated claims and hardcodes coverage_fraction=0.0.
prioritized_fixes.locus: src/polaris_graph/roles/role_pipeline.py:320-330 + judge_adapter.py:239-240 + mirror_adapter.py:366,395 (vs sentinel_adapter.py:426-465 which already degrades)
prioritized_fixes.fix: Catch a transport-level fault (RoleTransportError AND a raw transport RuntimeError) per-claim in run_claim_pipeline / the Mirror+Judge adapters and emit a fail-closed UNGROUNDED D8 row for that single claim, mirroring the existing Sentinel PG_SENTINEL_TRANSPORT_DEGRADE. The faulted claim DOWNGRADES (never upgrades); no verdict relaxed. Defense-in-depth behind F3.

prioritized_fixes.problem: M-70 segmentation keys by the contract entity's required_field names but _FDA_HEADINGS uses a fixed different vocabulary, so a fully-fetched 43081-char FDA label yields zero segments and dopaminergic_withdrawal_caution renders as a gap.
prioritized_fixes.fix: Add an alias/section map so semantic required-fields (warning/mechanism/clinical_consequence/management/device_precaution/mri_conditions/...) map to actual FDA-label headings (CONTRAINDICATIONS / WARNINGS AND PRECAUTIONS / ADVERSE REACTIONS / DOSAGE...), and when no heading matches fall back to windowing the full direct_quote for the M-70 LLM to extract per-field verbatim. Per-field verbatim-substring + strict_verify remain binding. Widens from already-fetched verified text; no cap.

prioritized_fixes.problem: quantified_analysis fired=false with 4025 numbers extracted; declined_no_spec conflates a genuine writer decline with a swallowed transport miss, and the run's pervasive transport faults make a mislabeled transport fault the likely cause.
prioritized_fixes.fix: Stop collapsing transport misses into None at the spec_provider boundary — distinguish a true decline (empty dict) from a transport fault (exception/empty-200), emit QUANTIFIED_STATUS_EMPTY_TRANSPORT and retry with the proven total-deadline guard. Only label declined_no_spec on a genuine writer decline. strict_verify/Regime-C still gate every quantified sentence; no cap.

prioritized_fixes.problem: Cited [2] dbs_complications_warning_signs (anchors ~12 Mechanism+Safety sentences) renders url='' despite a DOI in available_artifacts — a §-1.1 traceability hole on a load-bearing citation; bibliography [2] is unverifiable by the reader.
prioritized_fixes.locus: bibliography.json:10-15 (url='') + report.md:76 + the bibliography render path
prioritized_fixes.fix: In the bibliography renderer, when a cited entity has empty url but a doi/pmid in available_artifacts, synthesize the canonical https://doi.org/<doi> (or pubmed) URL before emitting; if still empty after backfill, FAIL LOUD with the ev_id rather than rendering a blank-URL citation. Pure traceability; no faithfulness/breadth/cap impact.

prioritized_fixes.problem: dbs_device_mri_safety anchored to a single anti-bot FDA PDF that fetched as a 174/266-char shell with no fallback; A15-recovered spans don't propagate into the V30 contract slot -> regulatory_dbs_device_safety renders as a gap.
prioritized_fixes.locus: full_run.log:830-831,1255 (shell), :789 (frame-row propagation gap) + frame_fetcher + V30 contract_section_runner
prioritized_fixes.fix: (1) frame_fetcher: when a contract anchor URL is a known scanned/anti-bot PDF shell, attempt an OA-mirror/PMC/alternate-format fetch (or PyMuPDF-OCR / raise the docling ceilings) before declaring METADATA_ONLY. (2) Implement the log:789 frame-row propagation fix so the V30 slot draws its direct_quote from the SAME re-grounded strict_verify-accepted enrichment span pool, letting a corroborating device-safety source in the 794 pool fill the slot. Re-uses already-verified spans; no cap.

prioritized_fixes.problem: mds.22340 staging source fetched 7408 chars but core_client hard-REJECTED the canonical copy on a year-metadata mismatch (expected 2008 got 2012, a version/reprint skew) -> mechanism_disease_staging (the most on-topic caregiver entity) renders as a gap. NOTE: this is the one fix adjacent to the banned-relaxation pattern — it changes what is ADMITTED AT FETCH TIME, not what verify accepts; strict_verify still gates every extracted field verbatim, so it is faithfulness-safe but flagged for scrutiny.
prioritized_fixes.fix: Relax the year-mismatch from a hard-drop to a soft warning that still returns the fetched content (the DOI is authoritative; a version/reprint year skew should not nullify a verified span). M-58 staging extraction then runs against the real span; strict_verify still gates each field verbatim. This is a fetch-admission widening, NOT a verify relaxation and NOT a cap.

prioritized_fixes.problem: ev_116 + ev_687 lost their coverage map on a transient empty-error MAP fault with no retry, silently excluding 2 sources from findings.
prioritized_fixes.fix: Add a bounded retry to the evidence_distiller MAP step and, on final failure, a deterministic keep-the-row-as-raw-evidence fallback so a transient judge fault does not silently drop a source from the finding set. No cap.

prioritized_fixes.problem: storm_query_expansion + agentic_search report firing_status='enabled_not_reached' though STORM personas DID fire (log:20); a resume-from-snapshot bypasses the in-band telemetry-update block, risking FL-05 false alarms / false confidence (a §-1.1 monitoring-integrity defect).
prioritized_fixes.locus: scripts/run_honest_sweep_r3.py:4273-4277 (initial firing_status) + the in-band update blocks (~5064/5173/5756/5844) ; manifest @7246-7253 ; full_run.log:20,1263-1264
prioritized_fixes.fix: On a resume path, either mark firing_status='not_applicable_resume' for STORM/agentic (so FL-05 + monitors don't treat resume as a silent degrade) or thread the real STORM persona/interview counts from the early phase into the telemetry. Observability-only; no faithfulness/breadth/cap impact.

prioritized_fixes.problem: LATENT (not the run5 trigger): the credibility LLM-judge nested thread pools deadlock on a trickle socket when judge is ON (outer future.result with NO timeout + inner fut.result whose read-gap never trips). PG_CREDIBILITY_LLM_JUDGE=off mitigates it but that off-switch is what triggers F2. Must NOT be re-armed if Form A of the keystone is taken.
prioritized_fixes.fix: Only required if the keystone takes Form A (LLM site #2 stays hot). Then: (1) give the OUTER skill-pool join a per-future timeout mapping a wedged source to its priors-only judgment (judge_error=True), and (2) complete ITEM 2a — a THREAD-LOCAL httpx client per worker thread so concurrent force-close cannot contend, letting PG_CREDIBILITY_PASS_MAX_INFLIGHT lift off 1 with PG_CREDIBILITY_PASS_WALL_S backstop. Form B avoids this entirely. No cap/throttle (the wall is an existing backstop, not a new thinner).

biggest_risks: KEYSTONE FORM RISK: if F2 is implemented as Form A (flip the guard but leave the LLM entailment site #2 _verify_member_in_isolation->verify_sentence_provenance hot) WITHOUT ITEM 2a thread-local judge + bounded inflight, it RE-ARMS the exact Q72/Q76/Q90 credibility-pass deadlock (F16) that PG_CREDIBILITY_LLM_JUDGE=off was set to avoid — the basket would then re-degrade to empty under the wall and breadth stays at 9. Take Form B (deterministic verify_fn, no LLM in the basket path) to make the keystone deadlock-free; if Form A is unavoidable, F16/ITEM 2a is a HARD P0 co-requisite, not P2.

STACKED-DEPENDENCY RISK: breadth needs ALL FOUR of F1+F2+F4+F5 to land together. Shipping any subset silently keeps the output narrow (singleton baskets / empty basket / fragmented partition / unrendered spans). A behavioral replay-harness on a banked corpus_snapshot must assert collapsed>0 AND multi-source baskets appear AND bibliography count >> 9 in the REAL rendered output (§-1.4) — 'committed + green + Codex-approved' will NOT prove the four-way wiring fired.

FAITHFULNESS-AMPLIFICATION RISK: widening before fixing the ev_1 shell-span defect (F6+F7) could multiply mis-citations — confirm the basket builder attaches ONLY corroborators that each independently pass strict_verify against the claim (the design does, entailed_count=112 proves the judge is live), and land F6 (fail-close the M-69 rescue on a shell span) + F7 (label NLI-disputed sentences) so a wider report does not ship more security-page-grounded VERIFIED claims.

SAFETY-GATE RISK: the report shipped released_insufficient_safety_evidence with D8 coverage=0.000 — the strongest faithfulness gate never ran. F3 (is_closed getter guard) is P0 for FAITHFUL, equal to the breadth keystone; a WIDE report with an unadjudicated D8 is not the WIDE+FAITHFUL goal. On the unrecoverable transport path the EXISTING fail-closed RoleTransportError must still fire (D8 HOLDS) — never relax it to release on a crash.

BANNED-PATTERN ADJACENCY: F13 (core_client year-mismatch relax) is the one fix that reads adjacent to the banned relaxation pattern. It changes fetch-time ADMISSION, not verify acceptance (strict_verify still gates every extracted field verbatim), so it is faithfulness-safe and adds no cap/floor/throttle — but it should be reviewed explicitly rather than waved through, and must not be generalized into loosening any verify gate.

NO MISSED IN-SCOPE HOP (adversarial confirmation): within 794->9 there is NO source-drop hop (collapsed=0, evidence_selection.dropped_count=0; the 49 sentence + 37 claim removals are correct strict_verify/NLI faithfulness drops). The only real DROP is the pre-fetch fetch_cap=740 (324 candidates) which is UPSTREAM of the 794 denominator and out of scope — do not remove it and do not let any breadth fix introduce a compensating cap/floor.
